channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Microsoft Closes Doors on HoloLens 2, Signaling Shift in Augmented Reality Strategy
item.description: Microsoft ceases production of HoloLens 2, ending support in 2027. The move signals a shift in the company's augmented reality strategy, with a focus on software solutions and partnerships.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Fortnite Maker Epic Games Accuses Google and Samsung of Anticompetitive Conduct
item.description: Epic Games sues Google and Samsung, alleging antitrust law violations through Samsung's Auto Blocker feature.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The UK's AI Data Center Boom: Blackstone Invests $13.3 Billion in Europe's Largest Facility
item.description: Blackstone invests $13.3 billion to build a massive AI data center in Northumberland, UK, enhancing the country's AI infrastructure and positioning it as a hub for tech development in Europe.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
